candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Direct exact match from candidate list.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash flow statement ending cash for CHE.
Possible cash line, but less standard and no visible values; secondary to exact cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Matches ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Chose the exact balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Also appears to be the total current liabilities line in one period, but the explicit total line is cleaner.

variables.notes: Priority list provided because labels vary by year; both denote current liabilities total, with explicit total preferred first.

candidates.why: Exact current portion of long-term debt excluding leases; best candidate for short-term debt.
Could be short-term financing debt if used, but values are blank and likely not needed where current maturities line exists.
Financing-related current debt and non-lease; complements current maturities when no clean total current borrowings line exists.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Direct non-lease current portion of long-term debt; very strong label for STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:c. Selected non-lease current debt components only; excluded lease rows. Multiple rows are provided as a priority/coverage list because labels vary across years. They should not be double-counted within the same year if overlapping labels coexist.

candidates.why: Explicit current tax liability/payable style label on the balance sheet.
Likely taxes payable/current tax liabilities under IFRS-style wording.
Tax-related but non-current deferred taxes, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Used current tax liability labels only; excluded deferred tax liabilities. Priority list reflects possible year-to-year label changes.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet analogue to property, plant and equipment under IFRS; preferred net PPE-style total.
Gross PPE line, but visible values are blank and net total tangible assets is cleaner when available.

variables.notes: Preferred net/total PPE-style balance sheet line ('Tangible assets'). Included gross PPE as secondary label for possible year variation.
Direct exact match from candidate list.

candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Intermediate/balancing line, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chose the final net operating cash flow line.
